description_long: This is a plush, humanoid stuffed toy with a predominantly purple exterior and a soft, rounded body. The toy features a white, human-like face with dark, hollow eyes and an open mouth, giving it a striking and somewhat unsettling appearance. Its head is topped with a purple triangular antenna, and it has large, rounded ears on either side. The toy's belly displays a rectangular, light gray patch, and its arms and legs are short and stubby, matching the overall plush design. The surface appears fuzzy and matte, typical of synthetic fabric used in stuffed toys. The toy is modeled after the character Tinky Winky from the Teletubbies franchise.
description: A purple, plush humanoid stuffed toy with a triangular antenna, large ears, and a white, expressive face. It has a light gray patch on its belly and a fuzzy, soft exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white, human-like face, triangular antenna, large ears, and the light gray belly patch.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the rounded profile, protruding ear, and the thickness of the limbs and body.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the solid purple back, both ears, and the triangular antenna without facial features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the ear, body contour, and the side of the face.
attribute_facial_expression: The face has a wide open mouth and dark, hollow eyes, giving it a distressed or screaming expression. The eyebrows are not visible, and the overall look is intense and unsettling.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms slightly bent and extended outward, legs straight and close together, and head facing forward.
